name: SaveLoad
summary: The SaveLoad class represents a save-load-save as group of controls including the functionality.

constructors.name: SaveLoad
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SaveLoad class with the default language and file extensions.

properties.name: HelpFileType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the help file type.

properties.name: HelpKeyword
properties.summary: Gets or sets the HelpKeyword that the help file should be opened for. If you do not provide a HelpKeyword and HelpUrl is not set, the default start page for Tekla Structures Help viewer is displayed.

properties.name: HelpUrl
properties.summary: Gets or sets the HelpUrl where the help file is located. If you do not provide a HelpUrl, the Tekla Structures help viewer will be displayed with given HelpKeyword.

properties.name: SaveAsText
properties.summary: Gets or sets the text in the SaveAs text box.

properties.name: SaveLoadText
properties.summary: Gets the currently selected file name in the Save/Load combo box.

properties.name: UserDefinedHelpFilePath
properties.summary: Gets or sets the file path where the UserDefined help file is located. If you do not provide a UserDefinedHelpFilePath, the general Help file, help.chm, will be displayed.

events.name: AttributesLoadClicked
events.summary: The AttributesLoadClicked event is triggered just after the load button has been clicked.

events.name: AttributesLoaded
events.summary: The AttributesLoaded event is triggered just after attributes have been loaded into the dialog.

events.name: AttributesSaveAsClicked
events.summary: The AttributesSaveAsClicked event is triggered just after the save as button has been clicked.

events.name: AttributesSaveClicked
events.summary: The AttributesSaveClicked event is triggered just after the save button has been clicked.

events.name: AttributesSaved
events.summary: The AttributesSaved event is triggered just after attributes are saved to a file.

events.name: AttributesSavedAs
events.summary: The AttributesSavedAs event is triggered just after attributes are "saved as" to a file.

events.name: HelpOpenClicked
events.summary: The HelpOpenClicked event is triggered just after the help button has been clicked.

events.name: HelpOpened
events.summary: The HelpOpened event is triggered just after the help file is opened.
